mainstream.description: Default buyer panel for baseline concept validation.

skeptic.description: Users who demand stronger proof and challenge assumptions early.

privacy_sensitive.description: Users who heavily weight data minimisation and trust boundaries.

inclusion.description: Users likely to notice exclusionary copy or inaccessible flows.

political_risk.description: Users alert to reputation, framing, and public-sensitivity issues.

low_tech.description: Users with lower digital confidence and lower tolerance for setup friction.

budget_constrained.description: Users who feel subscription creep and need quicker ROI proof.

extreme_user.description: Users with unusually strong workflow pain and higher adoption appetite.

expert_advisor.description: Synthetic expert-perspective personas for strategy critique, concept pressure testing, and adoption-risk review.
